title: Plantaginorchis dianthoides
taxonomy: Plantaginorchis dianthoides is a species of orchid, and it belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The genus Plantaginorchis is part of the subfamily Orchidoideae. Further classification of this species places it in the tribe Orchideae. This classification helps to group and understand the evolutionary relationships of Plantaginorchis dianthoides and its relatives. The classification is a key component in botanical research and identification of plant species.
